title: Search optimization needs an end-to-end benchmark corpus, not another closure tally
impact: Future fusion/rerank changes cannot be judged by local contract tests alone.

title: v1.0.2 residual is marginal code-graph evidence, not broad regression
impact: Phase D should target proof gaps and benchmarks rather than reopening closed packets.

title: Weak-retrieval hallucination remains the canonical failure mode to guard
impact: Citation and refusal policies should remain first-class in all fusion experiments.
